items.text:
PROJECT: 11 MAY
SUMMARY: WhatsApp bot that sends hourly birthday compliments to Soumya.
STACK: Node.JS / Twilio API / OpenAI API
YEAR: 2025

The bot is scheduled on Node.js to ping OpenAI periodically and deliver each generated compliment to WhatsApp via Twilio.

PROJECT: 11 MAY
SUMMARY: WhatsApp bot that sends hourly birthday compliments to Soumya.
STACK: Node.JS / Twilio API / OpenAI API
YEAR: 2025

Context is provided by reflecting on past wins and pairing them with a few photographs, so the compliments feel sincere and specific.

PROJECT: 11 MAY
SUMMARY: WhatsApp bot that sends hourly birthday compliments to Soumya.
STACK: Node.JS / Twilio API / OpenAI API
YEAR: 2025

The implementation is available on GitHub for anyone who wants to build a similar birthday bot.

PROJECT: DOKI DOKI
SUMMARY: Otome dating game where correct answers win a date with Soumya.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / Email.JS
YEAR: 2025

Doki-doki lets players experience a dialogue-based “date” and, when answers are correct, unlock the chance to win a real-life date with Soumya.

PROJECT: DOKI DOKI
SUMMARY: Otome dating game where correct answers win a date with Soumya.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / Email.JS
YEAR: 2025

In this version, the dateable characters are all Soumya’s personas based on the origin of her names and personality shifts.

PROJECT: DOKI DOKI
SUMMARY: Otome dating game where correct answers win a date with Soumya.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / Email.JS
YEAR: 2025

Progression happens through conversation; winning routes submit the player’s contact details via email so Soumya can follow up for a real date.

PROJECT: FAIRY
SUMMARY: Mobile app that plays “fairy dust” sparkles when Soumya’s manager is nearby.
STACK: Node.JS / Capacitor.JS / Firestore Database
YEAR: 2025

The concept started as a “fairy godmother” joke after the manager helped with Soumya’s workload.

PROJECT: FAIRY
SUMMARY: Mobile app that plays “fairy dust” sparkles when Soumya’s manager is nearby.
STACK: Node.JS / Capacitor.JS / Firestore Database
YEAR: 2025

The app stores the manager’s real-time geolocation in Firestore and compares it with Soumya’s location.

PROJECT: FAIRY
SUMMARY: Mobile app that plays “fairy dust” sparkles when Soumya’s manager is nearby.
STACK: Node.JS / Capacitor.JS / Firestore Database
YEAR: 2025

When the distance is within five meters, it triggers the sparkly fairy-dust sound.

PROJECT: GRAYS
SUMMARY: Mathematical visualization that encodes 128 non-binary genders in a 3D space.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / X3dom
YEAR: 2018

Grays argues that gender identity is not determined by biological sex alone, and explores how real-world variation breaks the “gender binary” assumption.

PROJECT: GRAYS
SUMMARY: Mathematical visualization that encodes 128 non-binary genders in a 3D space.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / X3dom
YEAR: 2018

The project assigns a binary encoding to 128 non-binary gender types and plots them so each identity has mathematical relationships with others.

PROJECT: GRAYS
SUMMARY: Mathematical visualization that encodes 128 non-binary genders in a 3D space.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / X3dom
YEAR: 2018

The visualization frames gender as an expansive field of identities and expressions, not a single linear spectrum.

PROJECT: HOMINIDAE
SUMMARY: Interactive series of autonomous artworks that model sexual aggression in great apes.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / P5.JS
YEAR: 2020

Hominidae simulates different forms of sexual violence and aggression observed in great apes through interactive, autonomous visuals.

PROJECT: HOMINIDAE
SUMMARY: Interactive series of autonomous artworks that model sexual aggression in great apes.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / P5.JS
YEAR: 2020

The work does not endorse sexual violence; it treats “natural” explanations as insufficient and frames coercion and inequality as problems worth examining.

PROJECT: HOMINIDAE
SUMMARY: Interactive series of autonomous artworks that model sexual aggression in great apes.
STACK: HTML / CSS / Javascript / P5.JS
YEAR: 2020

Evolutionary and dominance-based mating strategies are used as framing to show how aggression can escalate across generations.

PROJECT: JIMIN
SUMMARY: Money-plant “husband” that recognizes Soumya and reacts to his mood.
STACK: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors
YEAR: 2022

Jimin is a talking plant husband desktop character powered by an image-classifying model that recognizes Soumya through a webcam. He only responds to her.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors

items.text:
PROJECT: JIMIN
SUMMARY: Money-plant “husband” that recognizes Soumya and reacts to his mood.
STACK: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors
YEAR: 2022

His behavior changes with care and environment: affectionate when watered and happy, shy and sleepy when it is dark, and grumpy when the soil is dry.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors

items.text:
PROJECT: JIMIN
SUMMARY: Money-plant “husband” that recognizes Soumya and reacts to his mood.
STACK: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors
YEAR: 2022

An extended “Harem” app adds another plant character (a ZZ plant inspired by Kim Seokjin) with its own playful personality and plant-pun style.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors

items.text:
PROJECT: JIMIN
SUMMARY: Money-plant “husband” that recognizes Soumya and reacts to his mood.
STACK: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors
YEAR: 2022

The original intent-based NLP approach was later revised to use the OpenAI API, enabling a wider range of moods and conversations.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Electron / Google Teachable Machine / ML5.JS / Socket.IO / OpenAI API / Arduino UNO / Various sensors

items.text:
PROJECT: @TAEGIFICBOT
SUMMARY: Twitter bot that replies with custom BTS fanfiction recommendations when tagged.
STACK: Node.JS / Twitter API / Google Sheets / Axios / Cheerio / Firestore Database / Heroku
YEAR: 2020

@taegificbot was created to make it faster to find queer BTS fanfiction and recommend stories to Twitter users.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Twitter API / Google Sheets / Axios / Cheerio / Firestore Database / Heroku

items.text:
PROJECT: @TAEGIFICBOT
SUMMARY: Twitter bot that replies with custom BTS fanfiction recommendations when tagged.
STACK: Node.JS / Twitter API / Google Sheets / Axios / Cheerio / Firestore Database / Heroku
YEAR: 2020

A web scraper collects story metadata (since AO3 has no public API) and stores it in Firebase/Firestore after the initial spreadsheet of links is prepared.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Twitter API / Google Sheets / Axios / Cheerio / Firestore Database / Heroku

items.text:
PROJECT: @TAEGIFICBOT
SUMMARY: Twitter bot that replies with custom BTS fanfiction recommendations when tagged.
STACK: Node.JS / Twitter API / Google Sheets / Axios / Cheerio / Firestore Database / Heroku
YEAR: 2020

A Twitter bot responds to mentions, supports filtering by length/genre/pairings/tropes/completion status and can avoid stories with specified trigger warnings; it also provides daily recommendations. The bot is no longer active, but the code remains available.

metadata.stack: Node.JS / Twitter API / Google Sheets / Axios / Cheerio / Firestore Database / Heroku

items.text:
PROJECT: ZOMBIE
SUMMARY: Twitter bot that continues posting from Soumya’s account after she’s “gone”.
STACK: Node.JS / Twitter API
YEAR: 2021

An updated version is in development.
